Their logic is deep, but incomprehensible to others, so they often remain silent, feeling the meaninglessness of explanations, while others perceive them as cold or arrogant. If the quality is not realized, internal tension, isolation, and constant analysis of the shortcomings of the world and oneself arise, and in the body this can manifest itself as compactions and the accumulation of “hidden” tension.
three.recommendation: Engage in activities that involve your hands and body - crafts, sports, work on the land: this will help realize your natural ability to work and relieve internal tension from the eternal feeling that you have not done “enough.” With three sixes, ambition is always higher than satisfaction with results, so it is important to regularly decompress through physical activity and a healthy lifestyle - this is the best “antidote” to despondency and a feeling of unfulfillment.
three.near: This is a person with a rebellious, changeable nature, for whom there will never be enough - it is impossible to satisfy all his needs, and it is not worth trying. Do not take responsibility for his mood and do not try to guess his desires - most often he himself does not know them or understands that they are unrealistic. Give him space for action: construction, repairs, sports, hiking - all this helps him find inner balance. Communication with him requires a lot of energy, and if you have less than two twos, it is important to keep your distance and connect other people so as not to become exhausted.
three.upgrade: If you have many sixes, it is important to choose activities related to analysis and systems thinking - logistics, programming, accounting, science. In such areas you can become truly brilliant and be of great benefit. To reduce internal tension, learn to open up, share your thoughts and not judge others, but notice their uniqueness. Allow yourself to be imperfect, lighter and more humane - this will help you and those around you relax. It is better to realize the depth and power of the mind in the professional sphere, where it is truly valued.

four.label: Four or more sixes
four.text: People with three sixes have enormous ambitions and a strong sense of purpose, thanks to which they can achieve impressive results even in the absence of special talents. They strive for fame and material well-being and for this they easily change their lifestyle, environment, or even country. At the same time, “sixers” are deeply analytical, insightful, often reserved and tend to hide their thoughts, which creates a feeling of mystery and internal inaccessibility. Their self-esteem is often inflated, their position is tough and reasoned, and their criticism is high both towards themselves and towards others. If the quality is not realized, loneliness, meaninglessness and a tendency to introspection, which can turn into self-criticism, are possible; in the body this is reflected by a tendency towards “densifications” - symbolic accumulations of unexpressed thoughts and experiences.
four.recommendation: If you have four or more sixes in your psychomatrix: you are capable of achieving enormous heights thanks to your strength, hard work and ambition, but it is important not to lose simple human joys. Try to develop not only those qualities for which you are respected and considered a strong personality, but also inner kindness, the ability to understand and support others - this brings no less satisfaction than recognition and success. From time to time, turn to your inner world and ask yourself what your soul really wants - this will help reduce your dependence on external assessments and make your life truly happy.
four.near: Learn to formulate and calmly voice your opinion, even if it differs from the position of significant people, and train the ability to refuse in order to stop living by other people’s expectations. Try to act professionally, assigning yourself to specific roles—whether you are a professional, a parent, a partner, or a friend—and focus on each individually to better understand your strengths and weaknesses. Keeping a diary will help develop internal support: record your thoughts, feelings and observations in order to become more confident, overcome the fear of loneliness and learn to rely primarily on yourself.
four.upgrade: It is important for people with a large number of sixes to choose activities related to analysis and systems thinking - this is where they can show genius and bring real benefit to society. To reduce internal tension, they need to open up more, share thoughts and feelings, learn to see the value in each person, and not just by assessing their knowledge or professionalism. It is important to overcome closedness, allow yourself to be simple, sometimes even “stupid” and frivolous - this makes life easier and happier, and helps loved ones relax and feel safe. It is better to realize depth, exactingness and analyticalness in the professional sphere, and in your personal life allow yourself lightness, humanity and lively communication, so as not to turn out to be an unrecognized genius, stuck in your own thoughts.

zero.label: Lack of sevens
zero.text: If there is not a single seven in the psychomatrix, this does not mean that luck will pass you by - it just does not come on its own. Everything you get will be the result of work, discipline and inner growth. Everyone has intuition, but in the absence of a seven, its weak voice is easily drowned in fears and emotions, so you more often rely on facts, control and logic, experiencing anxiety when the situation cannot be controlled. To “hear” yourself, it is important to learn to calm your mind and emotions - meditation, breathing practices, yoga, creativity, monotonous relaxing activities and communication with nature will help. Gradually, intuition will begin to appear naturally, not as a goal, but as a result of inner harmony, and your efforts will bring well-deserved rewards.
zero.recommendation: If you don’t have sevens in your psychomatrix: just remember that luck comes to you through work and perseverance, and not through miracles. Don’t count on random gifts from fate - create them yourself, relying on your own strength, responsibility and hard work. Develop your talents, look for your strengths, believe in yourself - and then it is your efforts that will bring those very happy opportunities that others are given as if “from heaven.”
zero.near: Support him, instill faith in his own strengths and help him overcome failures, because he is able to learn only through his own experience. Don’t do his work for him - the only value for him is what he achieves himself. Think through the steps together and don’t let him give up, because his path is to act and not wait for miracles. If you have at least one seven, you can become a real support and protection for him, so take care of the relationship and remain a kind, supportive person for him.
zero.upgrade: To develop intuition in the absence of sevens, it is important to work on your general state: reduce the level of emotions and fears, learn internal balance. Yoga, meditation, breathing practices, creativity, monotonous calming activities and communication with nature help - everything that allows you to relax your psyche and hear your feelings. Over time, intuition will manifest itself naturally if the main goal is not to “turn it on”, but to create a harmonious and happy life.

one.label: One seven
one.text: One seven in the psychomatrix is ​​a good sign of good luck. Life will periodically work out in your favor, albeit not too often. Small miracles are possible on their own, but real great success comes only when you actively work. Therefore, do not count on complete luck: without effort, you will only be lucky in small things, and the more you work, the more significant the gifts of fate become.
one.recommendation: If you have one seven in your psychomatrix, fate really favors you, but this is not a reason to lose caution: do not take unnecessary risks and realistically assess your strengths. You should not expect that luck will always get you out of any situation - luck has its limits. If you work hard, make smart decisions and maintain order in your life, then favorable circumstances will occur to you much more often, and luck will bring tangible results.
one.near: He goes his own way and intuitively feels where his luck is, so don’t stop him from moving in the chosen direction, even if it seems strange to you. When he works and tries, an aura of luck seems to appear around him - but it can either appear or disappear. It is important to love and support him not only during periods of success, but also when he loses his bearings. If you don't have sevens, you can feed off his luck a little, but don't expect it to always work. If he starts having difficulties, help him calmly figure it out: most likely, he has temporarily deviated from his path or made the wrong choice.

two.label: Two sevens
two.text: Two sevens give a person a very powerful intuition, which opens almost any door for him, enhancing his attractiveness and attractiveness. He senses clues not only about himself, but also about those close to him, but sometimes he can confuse intuition with fears. People with multiple sevens often fear their abilities, hide them, and live with a sense of internal burden due to knowledge that is difficult to explain logically. Their intuition is quiet, accurate, but requires the ability to distinguish it from worries. The main difficulty is the tendency to violate boundaries, reading the feelings of others and sacrificing oneself. In order to harmoniously realize your potential, it is important to learn to talk about your feelings, manage fears, maintain a balance between empathy and personal life, and direct the depth of perception for the benefit of yourself and others.
two.recommendation: If you have two sevens in your psychomatrix: you almost always feel exactly your calling and the direction in which you should go - and when you follow this path, life develops easily and safely. If for some reason you deviate from it, difficulties may arise, but it is never too late to return: fate will open the doors for you again. Your wishes often come true, so choose only the best for yourself - the world responds to your inner intentions.
two.near: Don’t be jealous of his luck and learn to rejoice in his achievements - next to such a person you are already a winner. His main task is to realize himself in an important matter, and for the sake of this he can put family or relationships in the background, so treat this with understanding and, if necessary, take more responsibility on yourself. Listen to his advice, but still go your own way - your destinies may obey different laws. If a streak of troubles has come in his life, it means that he has lost his way from the intended path: support him, help him regain faith in himself and see what mistakes need to be corrected in order to restore harmony.
two.upgrade: Learn to accept someone else's pain as part of their journey: suffering is often a lesson that no one can learn for another. React not to your feelings, but to a direct request - this is the only way the help will be useful and will not violate other people’s boundaries. Channel your sensitivity into action or creativity, not sacrifice. Trust your intuitive feelings, but treat them lightly, as a version, and not as the truth, giving the person the right to choose. When working and helping people, maintain “purity of thoughts” - act professionally, without trying to be a savior or all-knowing. Do what you can, no more and no less, and let go of the situation, remembering that everyone is responsible for their own life.

three.label: Three sevens
three.text: If there are three sevens in the psychomatrix, such a person’s luck is almost magical - as soon as he thinks about something, it begins to come true. But it is important to remember: this mechanism works both as a plus and as a minus - negative thoughts also become reality. Strengthened intuition allows you to receive “hints” not only about yourself, but also about loved ones, but due to the difficulty of explaining your feelings logically, a person can confuse them with fears, close themselves off, or even sacrifice themselves. To use the gift without harm, it is important to distinguish intuitive cues from worries, respect the boundaries of others, and channel sensitivity into creative areas. Positive thinking and awareness make his path truly happy and successful.
three.recommendation: If you have three sevens in your psychomatrix, your desires are fulfilled with extraordinary ease, so it is important to carefully control your thoughts. Consciously get rid of fears and negative fantasies so as not to attract what you are afraid of. Direct your attention only to what you really want to get, and dream consciously - otherwise you can attract unnecessary problems. Learn to control your powerful intuitive gifts and use them for good.
three.near: Remember that his luck was not given for entertainment, but to fulfill an important life mission, so he needs to focus on business and not waste energy - support him in this. If you have two or more sevens, together you become a truly strong union, capable of achieving outstanding results; if there are fewer sevens, do not compete with him in luck - rely on your strengths and simply accept the peculiarities of his fate. You can bask in his successes, but don’t try to follow his path. And if troubles suddenly befall him, it means he is using his gift incorrectly and attracting negative scenarios - help him remember his previous successes, regain faith in himself and return to his true, happy path.
three.upgrade: It is important to allow the other to experience their own lessons and not try to save them at the cost of yourself. Pain is part of the journey, and interfering where you are not asked only violates boundaries and robs the person of their experience. It is worth helping only when the person himself has made a request - then your support will be accepted and will be beneficial. For those who have strong intuition and developed sensitivity, it is important to channel these qualities into business or creativity, without getting lost in other people’s experiences. Learn to talk about your feelings softly, like a version, leaving the right of choice to others. Purity of intentions, respect for boundaries and the ability to do exactly what you can are the best way to help without self-sacrifice

four.label: Four or more sevens
four.text: Four sevens are an extremely rare combination that gives a person almost miraculous power: his will and intuition are capable of turning events in the right direction, and a powerful field of luck is formed around him. But such a gift requires hardening, so life often sends serious tests to strengthen this talent. Owners of many sevens receive clues not only about themselves, but also about loved ones, but they often confuse intuition with fears, which is why they try to “turn off” their abilities or suffer from feelings of guilt. Their sensitivity can lead to self-sacrifice, the desire to save others at the expense of themselves, the violation of boundaries and emotional exhaustion. For this gift to work for good, it is important to learn to distinguish between intuition and fear, respect other people's boundaries, help only when asked, and channel your sensitivity into a creative profession, while maintaining your own value and mental stability.
four.recommendation: If there are four or more sevens in your psychomatrix, then you have been given a special mission - to bring goodness, justice and help people to the world. Start with yourself: organize your thoughts and emotions, strengthen your character, will and self-discipline. Study the laws of the world order and the power of thought. When your inner foundation is strong enough, you will be able to share knowledge and support others in fulfilling your purpose.
four.near: Free him from everyday worries - he needs strength to understand and master his unusual talent. Don't try to remake it: its otherworldly nature is part of its mission. He needs high goals and large-scale tasks, and your best help is to support or at least not interfere. If you have two or more sevens, you form a rare harmonious couple with great potential, but it is important that one of you maintains a connection with reality and takes charge of everyday issues. If you have only one seven or none at all, it will be difficult to interact as equals, and the optimal format for relationships in this case is more free, distant communication.
four.upgrade: Pain is an important part of the path, giving a person lessons and forcing him to change, so you cannot save others at the cost of yourself and interfere in their fate: everyone goes through their own trials and has the right to live the way they choose. Your task is to respect other people’s boundaries, respond only to direct requests, and not to your own feelings, not to try to do “the best,” but to do exactly what is asked of you. The high sensitivity of those who have many sevens should be directed into a profession or creativity, and not into sacrifice, otherwise there is a risk of self-destruction. Intuition should be used easily and consciously, sharing your feelings as a version, and not as a prediction, while maintaining purity of intentions. It is important to help without the desire to assert yourself, to value your life, to do what you can and to let go of the situation without feeling the obligation to save the whole world.

zero.label: Lack of eights
zero.text: The absence of eights is not a death sentence: it is difficult for such people to take care of others, but taking care of themselves can become their most important task, because having learned to take care of themselves, they will be able to help others. Yes, the absence of eights in combination with two, one, or even missing ones makes a person resentful of the world or inclined to blame others for his problems. In combination with three or more units, it makes the character self-centered, requiring serious internal work. At the same time, the absence of eights also gives freedom: everything that a person receives is obtained through his own labor, without debts to the world. After all, the “eight” is an advance payment, which then needs to be “paid”, sometimes at a high price. Therefore, for those who do not have eights, sometimes it is even easier: they do not owe anything to anyone and their task is simply to live, be happy and understand the basic laws of the world without breaking them.
zero.recommendation: If there are no eights in the psychomatrix, your main task is to learn to take care of yourself: conserve strength, build a comfortable lifestyle, develop talents and maintain internal balance. If you feel that your family or loved ones are draining you, allow yourself solitude and rest. In case of difficulties, you will, of course, come to the rescue, but try not to take on other people’s responsibilities unnecessarily - preserving your own resources is important to you.
zero.near: Try not to burden him with your problems and let him live his own life - it is important for him to sometimes take a break from people, even from his family. Don't be offended by the lack of care: he simply doesn't have enough resources for it. Don’t put pressure, don’t make claims and don’t make demands - it still won’t help, but an emotional explosion and conflict are quite possible.
zero.upgrade: The quality of the Eight cannot be “developed” directly: it will manifest itself when a person stops comparing himself with others, envying and waiting for outside help, and begins to develop, work and change his own attitude towards himself, people and the world. It is important to understand that any event has external and internal reasons, and it is the internal ones - feelings, thoughts, fears, grievances, expectations - that form recurring situations. By working with one’s internal state, a person gradually changes external circumstances: troubles and repeated mistakes disappear, health improves and real luck begins to appear - a conscious understanding that the world constantly talks to us and responds to our inner state.

one.label: One eight
one.text: People with one eight are responsible and caring in moderation, but they put their interests first and are not prone to selflessness, so you should not expect sacrifice from them in relationships. Eight is like an advance from the world: the right to fulfill desires and at the same time the obligation to do something meaningful. If a person uses this gift frivolously, the advance disappears and difficulties arise. Eights feel the laws of balance, have influence and high demands, sometimes becoming harsh or cynical without the support of compassion. Their task is to harmoniously combine earthly responsibilities with an internal mission, using their abilities environmentally and without self-destruction.
one.recommendation: If you have one eight in your psychomatrix: professions that require constant dedication and intense care for others (educator, teacher, doctor, etc.) are not suitable for you. Don’t take on all the family responsibility—distribute responsibilities equally. Excessive care quickly leads to irritation, so it is important to regularly take time for yourself and your pleasures. Of course, in critical situations you can help, but do not allow anyone to abuse your kindness - your resources are limited.
one.near: One should not expect constant care from a person with one eight - after a period of attention, he needs rest. It is important to support his desire to take care of himself, help him find his own interests and not put pressure, especially when he is irritated or tired: at such moments he simply needs peace. He feels responsibility, but is not able to bear its excessive burden, so it is better to divide responsibilities equally, without shifting everything to him.

two.label: Two eights
two.text: A person with two eights is focused on the environment, easily adapts to people and often chooses professions related to care and service, but his main value is his family, for which he is ready to give a lot. With a large number of eights (88, 888 and so on), the quality is enhanced: these are people to whom the world seems to give an advance - the right to fulfill their desires, but at the same time the obligation to do something meaningful for others. Their path resembles a mission: inside there is an “important box” - knowledge of the laws of the world, which must be applied for good. However, if a person takes his gifts lightly, the advance may end and difficulties begin. Such people feel the laws of balance, have strong influence, high demands on themselves and others, and can show rigidity or cynicism if the connection with compassion is lost. Their task is to connect earthly life with their inner mission, using their gifts environmentally and without destroying themselves.
two.recommendation: If you have two eights in your psychomatrix, you are kind, caring and easily fit into any environment, following the rules and sense of duty. But it is important to remember about yourself: listen to your inner voice and do not replace your own desires with the expectations of others. If duty requires one thing, and your heart demands another, allow yourself to choose what brings inner comfort in order to avoid accumulated tension and emotional discord.
two.near: This person is kind, flexible and extremely non-conflict - it is almost impossible to quarrel with him. If he begins to focus on new rules or principles, it means that another, more significant social circle has appeared in his life. It is useless to argue with him: even if he disagrees, he will either accept your point of view out of loyalty, or remain silent and move away - which is already a signal of a threat to the relationship. He will not break the connection himself, even in conflict; maximum - he will quietly go into the shadows and wait for the situation to improve, because it is important for him to maintain good relations with everyone.

three.label: Three eights
three.text: A person with three eights is a large-scale personality, capable of almost complete dedication for the sake of others and striving to be part of a meaningful whole - a team, city, country or important mission. He carries within himself an “advance” from the world: the right to good luck and fulfillment of desires, but in exchange he is obliged to do something significant and influence the lives of others. If such a person ignores his potential or treats it lightly, his luck runs out and difficulties begin. He feels universal laws, has a powerful influence, but is prone to internal tension, contradictions and even cynicism if he loses touch with compassion. His path is to learn to connect earthly life with an internal mission, using his knowledge and power environmentally, without destroying himself or those around him.
three.recommendation: If you have three eights in your psychomatrix, you can become a person on whom work rests and whose contribution evokes the sincere admiration of those around you. However, it is important not to turn the team into the highest value and not to dissolve in the expectations of others: maintain your individuality, remember personal boundaries and do not forget that true trust and respect come primarily from those closest to you.
three.near: A person with three eights is by nature very responsible, kind and caring, and it is important to create conditions for him so that he can show these qualities. Accept and appreciate his efforts, thank him, show that you need him, and respect his work - then he will respond to you with even more care. If he is completely immersed in work and emotionally distant, perhaps you should think about the state of your relationship. He easily forgets about himself, so give him your back, attention and support - and he will value you as deeply as he values ​​his great tasks aimed at serving people.
three.upgrade: A person with three or more eights seems to be doing well, but inside he is often tormented by the need to do something meaningful, a feeling of guilt for unrealized potential and the inability to allow himself to be weak. Two forces collide in him: the desire to change the world and the desire to live a simple earthly life, which creates a choice between service and family. The main thing for such a person is to increase activity and start doing what is really important, otherwise unrealized potential turns into tension, destruction, or attempts to “cover up” loved ones, depriving them of their own lessons. His task is not to serve a specific person, but to reveal his gift through business and purpose: then he becomes not an “umbrella” that protects everyone, but someone who helps others see their true nature and remember the value of life.

four.label: Four or more eights
four.text: People with a large number of eights are rare ascetics, as if born to serve humanity: they are spiritually mature, not attached to everyday comfort, live to help others and bring knowledge to people. But their path is connected with the law of balance: “take it, give it back.” The world, as it were, gives them an advance - good luck and support, reminding them of their purpose, but requires significant deeds. If a person uses this gift frivolously or avoids implementation, internal tension, anxiety, guilt and life trials begin. With proper development, such people become conductors of universal laws, but if there is an imbalance, they can show rigidity, cynicism, or a desire to change others. Their mission is to unleash their true potential, to serve the world through action while maintaining compassion and inner balance.
four.recommendation: If you have four or more eights in your psychomatrix, your path reveals itself to you: you were born to serve people and have a huge, almost inexhaustible resource of care and help. Follow the call of your heart - the more you give sincerely and unselfishly, the more strength and opportunities will return. Fatigue and exhaustion are not a problem for you if you act from pure intention without expecting a reward.
four.near: A person with four or more eights will never live a quiet family life - he is constantly drawn to where he is needed, because his mission is to help many. This must be accepted. Try to provide him with at least minimal household comfort, because he hardly cares about himself. Respect its purpose and do not try to remake it. If, instead of kindness, he shows rudeness and selfishness, he has probably deviated greatly from his path. Create conditions in which he can show his best qualities, show that his help and care are important to you, and give him the opportunity to take care of you.
four.upgrade: People with many Eights are characterized by internal tension: they feel that they must do something meaningful, and are tormented by guilt if they do not realize it. They constantly struggle between the power to serve the world and the desire to be a simple person, which leads to a choice between mission and family. Their potential is enormous, but if it is not used, the energy begins to destroy - problems appear in relationships, health, and a feeling of emptiness. Such people need to live actively, get involved in an important matter and show their value, otherwise they can either go into self-destruction or try to “cover up” others, depriving both themselves and their loved ones of freedom. Their path is not serving a specific person, but the implementation of a mission through work, where the knowledge “brought” to this world is revealed; then they become not an umbrella that protects and makes dependent, but one who helps people see depth, causality and their own worth, awakening in them the power to live according to the laws of the world.

zero.label: Lack of nines
zero.text: People with an absent Nine often face internal slowness, loss of purpose and stubbornness: they think for a long time, react to form rather than to substance, often resist change and require special treatment. They find it difficult to maintain focus, finish what they start, and adapt flexibly to situations, which can cause them to miss opportunities, experience conflict, feel “used,” and live more in the process than the result. You are characterized by pride and a reluctance to “bend in,” but at the heart of the problems is the lack of a clear goal and the ability to see the benefit for yourself. If you learn to take into account your needs, accept help, rebuild on time and bring things to the end, this quality becomes a strength - depth, philosophy and the ability to see meaning where others pass by.
zero.recommendation: If there is not a single nine in the psychomatrix, this does not mean a lack of intelligence or abilities. On the contrary, a person is simply given complete freedom in self-development: he can master any knowledge and develop memory, intelligence and learning ability to the level that he himself wants to achieve. This empty position is not a disadvantage, but a space for growth and choice.
zero.near: In order to level up your quality without nines, it is important to adhere to the “goal – behavior – result” algorithm: learn to formulate real, specific goals, be aware of your actions and their connection with what you want, see the results and assign them to yourself. People without nines tend to get carried away with the process, lose purpose, resist change, react to form, procrastinate and miss opportunities - therefore, it is especially important for them to complete things, accept everything that the world gives (both “pros” and “cons”), take responsibility for their decisions, regularly analyze their day and see the impact of their own actions on life. The main task is to develop flexibility, learn to notice your desires “here and now,” adapt to circumstances, maintain clarity of purpose and turn the process into a result that opens the way to the next step.

one.label: One nine
one.text: With one nine, it is more difficult for a person to learn and remember for a long time, but this is not a sign of low intelligence - it just requires more time, effort and repetition. He is slow, stubborn, often loses his goal, lives in the process, reacts to the form of address and easily gets into situations where he is used. Such a person may give up at the last steps and does not know how to change flexibly, which is why he misses opportunities and gets into conflict. It is important for him to learn to formulate specific goals, finish what he starts, take everything that life offers, develop flexibility and notice his real needs - then his hard work can lead to great results.
one.recommendation: If you have one nine in your psychomatrix, you are able to achieve success in your studies and professional growth, but only with the support of other strong qualities - ones, twos, fours or sevens. Otherwise, you will either have to accept the role of a good “average” person, or choose a narrow specialization where a broad outlook is not required. Having mastered a small but specific amount of knowledge and brought it to mastery, you can become an indispensable specialist in your field.
one.near: If this is a student with only nine grades, do not scold him for his average performance - rather support him, especially in subjects that are difficult. He will more easily learn what is truly interesting to him, so it is important to develop his talents and encourage curiosity. Don’t be offended by his forgetfulness - the brain simply quickly erases unnecessary things so as not to be overloaded. And don’t demand career heights: such a person can be absolutely happy, successful and wealthy, while remaining an ordinary, but stable worker who is satisfied with his life.
one.upgrade: With one nine, it is important to remember the “goal - behavior - result” algorithm every day, because such people often have desires, actions and results that do not coincide. You need to set specific goals, take into account real conditions, learn to fixate yourself in action and ask the question “why?”, bring any task to the end, be able to accept both good and difficult situations, work on the form of behavior, and not just on actions. It is useful to regularly summarize the results of the day, see your results, learn to be more flexible and adapt to changes, because one nine tends to live in the process, not the completion, and it is the development of this quality that helps to move forward and achieve what you want.

two.label: Two nines
two.text: People with two nines have a quick memory, a wide range of interests, flexibility, the ability to adapt to the situation and act at the right time. They strive to know a lot, be on time everywhere, be liked by everyone, and often get their way, but sometimes through cunning or pressure. Their mind is “situational”: they instantly read people’s moods, react to circumstances and know how to negotiate. There may be a risk of vanity, an endless race for new goals, a desire to sit on two chairs, and even self-betrayal - when, by adapting to others, a person loses his true desires. Nevertheless, such a psychomatrix provides enormous potential - with awareness and the right focus, it makes life very rich and productive.
two.recommendation: With two nines in the psychomatrix, a person has a strong memory, broad interests and the ability to quickly assimilate and retain large amounts of information. Such people easily find themselves in science, teaching, journalism, translation, finance and any areas where flexibility of thinking and working with data is required. Even without a high career position, their life becomes very rich thanks to the constant desire to learn new things, the ability to be in the right place at the right time and quickly adapt to the situation. With a large number of nines, this flexibility turns into impetuosity: a person is always in a hurry to get somewhere, achieves a lot, but sometimes loses focus, can be cunning, adapt to others and try to “sit on two chairs.” Their mind is situational, fast, focused on interacting with people, thanks to which they know how to negotiate and get what they want. However, many goals can turn into vanity and internal contradictions, so it is important to learn to choose the main thing and complete what you start.
two.near: He needs constant training and perfectly absorbs any information, so it is important to support his desire for knowledge. He remembers the past perfectly - both good and bad, so you should not offend him: once he heard or experienced it, he will not forget. He is able to remember in detail what you were like many years ago, and accurately convey your words and actions. If you find it difficult to understand techniques or new devices, trust it to him - he will quickly understand everything you need, and only laziness can be a hindrance, but not a lack of ability.
two.upgrade: It is important for a person with two or more nines to learn to set priorities and notice “signs” - real circumstances that either support his intentions or slow them down. Otherwise, the desire to get what you want at any cost leads to disappointment and damaged relationships. You need to keep track of the balance of the pros and cons of the situation, learn to enjoy what you already have, slow down and do one thing at a time, and also be honest with yourself and more principled with others - stop trying to please everyone, define your position and stick to it without betraying your own desires.

three.label: Three nines
three.text: Three nines in the psychomatrix give a person a brilliant memory, broad knowledge and the ability to easily master different areas - sometimes even completely unrelated. He can receive several educations and study all his life, but due to many interests and goals he often gets scattered, changes directions and does not always realize his high potential to the top. At the same time, his flexibility, speed of thinking and ability to “be in the right place at the right time” allow him to achieve a lot, although at times they create a feeling of fuss and constant racing.
three.recommendation: If you have three nines in the psychomatrix, you need an activity where there is a constant influx of new information and the opportunity to develop: journalism, law, science, analytics and other areas that require continuous learning. Without intellectual growth, you quickly lose interest, so choose a job where knowledge is constantly updated.
three.near: You can completely trust his memory - he quickly grasps information, makes almost no mistakes and is always interesting in communication if you share his passion for the topics. Monotony is harmful for him: without a change of impressions, he gets bored and may fall into apathy. Therefore, he needs movement, new places, people and events - business trips, trips, vigorous activity. Just accept: a dynamic, busy life is his natural environment in which he truly comes alive.
three.upgrade: With three nines, it is important to learn to set priorities and notice the “signs” of the situation: if circumstances are easy, this is support, if everything is falling apart, it’s worth stopping. Such people are often in a hurry, miss the present and become scattered, so it is useful for them to slow down, enjoy what they already have, do one thing at a time and be more honest with themselves, without trying to please everyone.

four.label: Four nines
four.text: Such a person is given enormous natural potential - phenomenal memory, mental flexibility and the ability for rapid development, but with this comes responsibility. If he does not use his abilities for the benefit of people and does not direct them towards creation, internal decline will begin. With the right self-discipline, determination and high morality, his gift can be revealed at the level of a genius, philosopher or sage who deeply understands the laws of the world and human nature; otherwise, multiple goals, speed and flexibility will only lead to fuss, dispersion and disappointment.
four.recommendation: If you have four nines, your talent cannot be left unused: it requires implementation. Continuous learning, development and work that benefits people is a vital necessity. Otherwise, enormous abilities will begin to turn into internal conflict and can be harmful to you.
four.near: He does not belong to you, or even to himself - he is driven by the high mission of serving people. It is important for him to find a close circle of interests and develop in this direction, and you can help with this, especially if he is a child. Even an adult with such data does not always immediately find himself, and the absence of obvious talents does not mean their absence - they will reveal themselves with support and favorable conditions. Notice and appreciate his unusualness, do not humiliate or offend him: otherwise he will close down and your relationship may suffer.
four.upgrade: It is important for a person with many nines to learn to set priorities and notice “signs” - that is, real circumstances that either support his path or slow him down. If he, passionate about his goal, does not notice obstacles, this can lead to disappointment and tense relationships. It is useful to evaluate the situation through a balance of pros and cons before going “for a break”, learn to enjoy what you already have, slow down and be in the moment, do one thing at a time and immerse yourself deeply in it. It is also important for him to be honest with himself, to indicate his position, not to strive to please everyone and allow himself to be uncomfortable, while maintaining internal stability.

five.label: Five or more nines
five.text: This is an extremely rare combination in which cognitive abilities and phenomenal memory are so dominant that they suppress other personality traits. Such a person is a real phenomenon who finds it difficult to find himself in real life: enormous intelligence can result in a feeling of unfulfillment, disappointment and even cynicism. His many goals, high speed of thinking and desire to do everything often lead to bustle, internal discomfort and difficulty maintaining focus, and attempts to adapt to everyone can cause conflicts and the feeling that he is “betraying” himself. It is important for him to learn to set priorities, see signs of circumstances, live in the moment, be honest with himself and not be afraid to make choices, so that his unique abilities become a support and not a source of internal discord.
five.recommendation: If you have five or more nines in your psychomatrix: your mind is so active and deeply analyzes everything around that it can deprive you of the simple joys of life. Learn to periodically “turn off” the flow of thoughts - meditate, watch nature, allow yourself to simply feel without trying to comprehend everything. Develop your emotions as carefully as your intellect. It is very important to channel a colossal supply of knowledge and memory into useful channels: engage in work where this potential will be realized, and if this is not possible, write books, share your ideas and discoveries.
five.near: It is important to avoid disputes and conflicts with such a person - his mind, filled with knowledge, often brings him sadness. Surround him with warmth and a calm atmosphere, gently distract him from difficult thoughts and be interested in what he knows and how he lives. Learn to listen. If this is a child, try to direct his abilities in a suitable direction in advance, support his interests and help him develop in the chosen direction.
five.upgrade: It is important for a “Niner” to learn to prioritize and notice “signs” - real circumstances that either support action or indicate the need to stop; otherwise, the desire to achieve a goal at any cost leads to disappointment and damaged relationships. It is useful to develop the ability to enjoy what you already have, to live in the present, without rushing, to do one thing at a time and immerse yourself in it completely. It is also important to be honest with yourself, stop trying to please everyone and allow yourself to be uncomfortable, maintaining your own position even under changing circumstances.
